title: cyclostemon laevis
intro: Cyclostemon laevis, also known as the cyclostemon plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cyclostemon laevis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
